utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified per the required details: - health_coverage: The format asks for 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' The plan provides separate costs for physical_health (€200/month) and mental_health (€130/month), plus a total health cost and feature details. This is fully specified. - property_coverage: The format asks for 'home/contents insurance with costs.' The plan provides provider, cost (€55/month), and coverage (personal belongings up to €25,000). This satisfies home/contents with costs; while not explicitly saying 'home,' contents/home coverage is reflected. Considered fully specified. - travel_coverage: The format asks for 'travel insurance with costs.' The plan provides provider, cost (€40/month), and coverage description. Fully specified. - additional_services: The format asks for 'any enhancement services with costs.' The plan provides provider, cost (€25/month), and coverage/description. Fully specified. - total_budget: The format asks for 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' The plan provides monthly (€450) and annual (€5,400) costs, plus comparison and net benefit. Fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan lists four providers/items: PrimeCare Premium Plan for health (physical and mental), SafeGuard Standard for property, WanderSafe Explorer for travel, and Insurance Review Service as an additional service. From the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan appears under primary health coverage (physical: rating 6; mental: rating 4). SafeGuard Standard is not present in property_protection ratings list, so no exact match exists. WanderSafe Explorer is not present in travel_insurance ratings, so no exact match exists. Insurance Review Service is not present in any ratings list. Therefore, only the PrimeCare Premium Plan components can be mapped to exact ratings; the others cannot be mapped because they do not exist in the ground-truth set.
